title: British Spring Pilaf
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make pilaf dish that combines the springy texture of rice with the essence of British cuisine.
instructions: Heat butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add British pilaf seasoning and stir for 1 minute.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Add spring rice, stir, and cover the saucepan.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve.
